identity.canonical_title: Trawin Zero Point Temporal Entanglement and I

theory.canonical_statement:
g_{\phi\phi} ; \langle T_{\mu
u} angle_{ren} = \lim_{x' 	o x}  rac{\hbar}{\pi^2} \int_{Cauchy} G_{\mu
u}^{(1)}(x, x') 	ext{Tr}[\gamma^\mu \otimes \gamma^
u] ;  orall e \in CTC : P(e | 	ext{future}(e)) = P(e | 	ext{past}(e)) ; E_k = \sqrt{p_k} |\psi_k^{future}angle \langle \psi_k^{past}|

u} angle_{ren} = \lim_{x' 	o x}  rac{\hbar}{\pi^2} \int_{Cauchy} G_{\mu

canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
g_{\phi\phi}
\]
\[
\langle T_{\mu\nu} \rangle_{ren} = \lim_{x' \to x} \frac{\hbar}{\pi^2} \int_{Cauchy} G_{\mu\nu}^{(1)}(x, x') \text{Tr}[\gamma^\mu \otimes \gamma^\nu]
\]
\[
\forall e \in CTC : P(e | \text{future}(e)) = P(e | \text{past}(e))
\]
\[
E_k = \sqrt{p_k} |\psi_k^{future}\rangle \langle \psi_k^{past}|
\]
